response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates an exceptional fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, with over 12 years of relevant experience, deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and a strong track record in full-stack development, AI agent infrastructure, and tooling. His contributions to open-source projects, architecture decisions, and cross-functional collaboration align well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (12+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern frameworks like Nest.js
Proven track record in AI agent development, tooling, and infrastructure, directly relevant to the role
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in architecture, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework in the job description)
Experience with Kotlin/Java is present but not emphasized in recent roles
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team
